license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qafdsbn
title: Total RNA extraction
author: Yuan Yao

steps_raw.instruction: Remove growth media.
Add 1 mL of TRIzol™ Reagent per 1 × 105—107 cells directly to the culture dish to lyse the cells.
Pipet the lysate up and down several times to homogenize.
Incubate for 5 minutes to permit complete dissociation of the nucleoproteins complex.
Add 0.2 mL of chloroform or 50 μL of 4-bromoanisole per 1 mL of TRIzol™ Reagent used for lysis, then securely cap the tube.
Incubate for 2–3 minutes.
Centrifuge the sample for 15 minutes at 12,000 × g at 4°C.
Transfer ~600 μL of the colorless, upper aqueous phase containing the RNA to a new tube.
Add an equal volume of 70% ethanol, then mix well by vortexing.
Invert the tube to disperse any visible precipitate that may form after adding ethanol.
Transfer up to 700 uL of the sample to a spin cartridge (with collection tube).
Centrifuge at 12,000 × g for 15 seconds.
Discard the flow-through, then reinsert the spin cartridge into the same collection tube.
Repeat step 2a–step 2c until the entire sample has been processed.
Add 700 μL of Wash Buffer I to the spin cartridge.
Centrifuge at 12,000 × g for 15 seconds.
Discard the flow-through, then reinsert the spin cartridge into the same collection tube.
Add 500 μL of Wash Buffer II to the spin cartridge.
Centrifuge at 12,000 × g for 15 seconds.
Discard the flow-through, then reinsert the spin cartridge into the same collection tube.
Repeat step 18-step 20 once.
Centrifuge at 12,000 × g for 1 minute to dry the membrane.
Discard the collection tube, then insert the spin cartridge into a recovery tube.
Add 30 μL-3 × 100 μL (3 sequential elutions with 100 μL each) of RNase-free water to the center of thespin cartridge.
Incubate for 1 minute.
Centrifuge at >12,000 × g for 2 minutes.
Discard the spin cartridge.
RNA integrity was verified by electrophoresis on a 1.2% agarose gel containing formaldehyde, and post stained with 1.0 μg/ml ethidium bromide.
Determine the quality and quantity of the purified RNA using UV absorbance at 260 nm.
